description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 6th; Slot wrists; Price 9,900 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This slender silver bracelet is worked in an intertwined design of three flowers. A DC 20 Knowledge (nature) check identifies the flowers as acacia, apocynum, and bilberry, symbolizing concealment, treachery, and falsehood. The bracelet grants the wearer a +5 competence bonus on Sense Motive checks, and a +5 resistance bonus on Will saves against enchantment effects. If the wearer makes a successful Will save against an enchantment, the caster of that spell incorrectly senses the effect has succeeded. Additionally, the braceletâs wearer knows an enchantment targeted him and the enchantmentâs source. Seducerâs bane creates an aura on its wearer, visible to detect magic, matching the failed enchantment spell or effect, and lasting as long as the intended enchantmentâs duration. However, if the braceletâs wearer attacks the caster or its allies, or otherwise acts in a way thatâs contradictory to the failed spellâs effect, the caster of that spell immediately realizes the enchantment was ineffective. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, detect magic, magic aura, resistance; Special creator must have 3 ranks in Sense Motive; Cost 4,950 gp.
